creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
On Sat, Jul 24, 1999 at 10:40:01AM -0700, Ade Lovett wrote:
>  
>  Please hold off on this PR for a few days.
>  
>  	gnome-core-1.0.8
>  	gnome-pim-1.0.9
>  and	gnome-libs-1.0.12


Updates have been made to the tarball at:

	http://www.lovett.com/~ade/freebsd/gnomediff.tar.gz

for gnome-core-1.0.9 (the 1.0.8 version was very short-lived),
and gnome-pim-1.0.9

gnome-libs-1.0.12 shows no signs of being formally released for
the next week or so (of course, now I've said that, it'll be
released in the next hour.. :)

The patches are ready to go..

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
